steps: Go to https://console.deepgram.com/ and sign up or log in
Select or create a project from the top-left project dropdown
Click 'API Keys' in the left sidebar
Enter a name for the key and optionally set an expiration date and scopes
Click 'Create Key' and copy the API key immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Deepgram API key. Used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (e.g. 'Token YOUR_KEY').

notes: New accounts receive $200 in free credits
The API key secret is only shown once at creation — copy it immediately
Keys are scoped per project; create separate keys for different projects
Use 'Token' prefix (not 'Bearer') in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Token YOUR_KEY'

test_endpoint.description: List all projects associated with the API key
